improvement: Cloudflare deployment workflows now emit an actionable, privacy-preserving blocker artifact that names only missing configuration keys, reason codes, and remediation text.
limits: This does not configure the GitHub environment.
This does not prove a Cloudflare deployment occurred.
A workflow run is still required to obtain and verify a served URL.
next_action: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, dispatch the workflow, and inspect the uploaded readiness, blocker, proof, and attestation artifacts.
